inputs.user_input: Draft and send an email to all students reminding them that the Software Testing quiz covering Unit Testing and Black Box Testing is next Monday at 9am. Include what topics to study.

output: I have sent the email to all students reminding them about the Software Testing quiz on Unit Testing and Black Box Testing, which is scheduled for next Monday at 9 AM. The email included the topics to study and was sent with the subject line "Reminder: Software Testing Quiz (Unit Testing & Black Box Testing) - Next Monday, 9 AM".
